Zählt die Anzahl der verknüpften Shapes: Counts the number of linked shapes on all slides.
Ändere den Absatzabstand hinter dem Absa: Change the paragraph spacing after the paragraph to the specified value (either in number of lines or in pt).
Change the paragraph spacing after the paragraph to the specified value (in pt).
Ändere den Absatzabstand vor dem Absatz: Change the paragraph spacing before the paragraph to the specified value (either in number of lines or in pt).
Change the paragraph spacing before the paragraph to the specified value (in pt).
Ändere den Absatzeinzug auf das angegebe: Change the paragraph indent to the specified value (in cm).
Ändere den Sondereinzug (1. Zeile, hänge: Change the special indent (first line, hanging) to the specified value (in cm).
Ändere den Text des selbst definierten S: Change the text of the self-defined sticker and insert it immediately.
Ändere den Zeilenabstand (entweder in Ab: Change the line spacing (either in number of lines or in pt).
Ändere den horizontalen Objektabstand au:
Change the horizontal object distance to the specified value (in cm).

Icon click for 0 spacing.
Shift click for 0.2 cm spacing.
Ctrl click to match spacing.
Ändere den linken Absatzeinzug auf das a: Change the left paragraph indent to the specified value (in cm).
Ändere den linken Innenabstand des Textf: Change the left inner margin of the text field to the specified value (in cm).
Change the left inner margin of the text field to the specified value.
Ändere den oberen Innenabstand des Textf: Change the top inner margin of the text field to the specified value (in cm).
Change the top inner margin of the text field to the specified value.
Ändere den rechten Absatzeinzug auf das: Change the right paragraph indent to the specified value (in cm).
Ändere den rechten Innenabstand des Text: Change the right inner margin of the text field to the specified value (in cm).
Change the right inner margin of the text field to the specified value.
Ändere den unteren Innenabstand des Text: Change the bottom inner margin of the text field to the specified value (in cm).
Change the bottom inner margin of the text field to the specified value.
Ändere den vertikalen Objektabstand auf:
Change the vertical object distance to the specified value (in cm).

Icon click for 0 spacing.
Shift click for 0.2 cm spacing.
Ctrl click to match spacing.
Ändere die Breite von Rundungen (bspw. a: Change the width of roundings (e.g. rounded rectangle), arrowheads (e.g. directional arrow) or corners (e.g. snipped rectangle) to the specified value (in cm or %, depending on the shape type).
Ändere die Dicke vom Rahmen bzw. der Lin: Change the thickness of the border or line
Ändere die Rotation des Shapes auf das a:
Change the rotation of the shape to the specified value (in degrees).

Icon click for rotation=0.
Shift click for rotation=180.
Ctrl click to match rotation.
Ändere die Transparenz vom Hintergrund: Change the transparency of the background
Ändere die Transparenz vom Rahmen bzw. d: Change the transparency of the border or line
Ändere in Innenabstand des Textfelds an: Change the inner margin of the text field on all sides to zero.
Ändert das Symbol der gewählten Bullet P: Changes the symbol of the selected bullet points.
Ändert den Abstand der Shapes. Je nach g: Changes the spacing of the shapes. Depending on the chosen mode, the shapes are moved or enlarged/shrunk.
Ändert den Spaltenabstand der Shapes. [A: Changes the column spacing of the shapes. [ALT] switches between moving and stretch/compress.
Ändert den Winkel der Shapes zur X-Achse: Changes the angle of the shapes to the X axis (in degrees). Measured from the defined reference point of the two first selected shapes.\n\nWith the ALT key, each shape is moved by the same delta angle relative to the first shape.
Ändert den Zeilenabstand der Shapes. [AL: Changes the row spacing of the shapes. [ALT] switches between moving and stretch/compress.
Ändert den euklidischen Objektabstand au: Changes the Euclidean object distance to the specified value (in cm). Measured from the defined reference point of the two first selected shapes.\n\nWith the ALT key, each shape is aligned at the same delta distance relative to the first shape.
Ändert die Distanz ausgehend vom linken: Changes the distance starting from the left shape and pushes all others to the right. Temporary switch to 'To the left' with [ALT].
Ändert die Distanz ausgehend vom oberste: Changes the distance starting from the top shape and pushes all others down. Temporary switch to 'Up' with [ALT].
Ändert die Distanz ausgehend vom rechten: Changes the distance starting from the right shape and pushes all others to the left. Temporary switch to 'To the right' with [ALT].
Ändert die Distanz ausgehend vom unterst: Changes the distance starting from the bottom shape and pushes all others up. Temporary switch to 'Down' with [ALT].
Ändert die Farbe der gewählten Bullet Po: Changes the color of the selected bullet points.
Änderung der Breite.\\n\\nBei gedrückter:
Change of width.

With the CTRL key held, change by 0.1 cm instead of 0.2 cm.

With the ALT key held, change relative per shape (if multiple shapes are selected).
Änderung der Höhe.\\n\\nBei gedrückter S:
Change of height.

With the CTRL key held, change by 0.1 cm instead of 0.2 cm.

With the ALT key held, change relative per shape (if multiple shapes are selected).
Änderung der Position von links.\\n\\nBe:
Change of position from the left.

With the CTRL key held, change by 0.1 cm instead of 0.2 cm.

With the ALT key held, change relative per shape (if multiple shapes are selected).
Änderung der Position von oben.\\n\\nBei:
Change of position from the top.

With the CTRL key held, change by 0.1 cm instead of 0.2 cm.

With the ALT key held, change relative per shape (if multiple shapes are selected).
Änderung der Position von unten.\\n\\nBe:
Change of position from the bottom.

With the CTRL key held, change by 0.1 cm instead of 0.2 cm.

With the ALT key held, change relative per shape (if multiple shapes are selected).
Änderung der Z-Order, also der Reihenfol: Change of the Z-order, i.e. the order of the shapes on the slide.
Öffne Konfigurationsdatei im Standardedi: Open configuration file in the default editor
Öffne Ordner mit BKT-Framework und Konfi: Open folder with BKT framework and configuration file
Öffne einen Dialog zur Auswahl der Shape: Open a dialog to select the shape properties by which the shapes on the current slide should be selected.
Öffnet Datei-Auswahldialog um referenzie: Opens a file selection dialog to replace the referenced file. The file must contain the same slide ID.
Öffnet Dialog um wählbare Sprachen zu än: Opens a dialog to change the selectable languages.
Öffnet den Dialog zum Einfügen von Symbo:
Opens the dialog for inserting symbols.

With the Shift key held, a non-breaking hyphen is inserted directly.

With the Ctrl key held, a non-breaking space is inserted.
Öffnet ein Menü mit verschiedenen Galler: Opens a menu with various galleries for quickly inserting symbols and special characters.
Öffnet einen Dialog zur Anzeige der Anza: Opens a dialog showing the number of selected shapes, numbers, sum of the numbers, number of characters, words, lines and paragraphs.
Überführe jeweils den Textinhalt der mar: Transfers the text content of each selected shape into a separate text shape.
Überprüfen, ob neue BKT-Version verfügba: Check whether a new BKT version is available
Überträgt die kopierte Größe und Positio: Transfers the copied size and position of the image crop to the selected image.
Transfers the copied size and position of the chart or plot area to the selected chart.
Überträgt die kopierten Tabellen-Dimensi: Transfers the copied table dimensions to the selected table.
